item.title: 👍Jayme Peloli - Mayor, Town of Wilkeson
item.description: Jayme Peloli signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Mayor, Town of Wilkeson.

item.description: Nichol Phillips signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Pacific Northwest 4-Wheel Drive Association.

item.description: Denice Carnahan signed up to testify Pro.

item.description: Sherry Davis signed up to testify Other.

item.description: Ron Fowler signed up to testify Pro.

item.description: Steve Murphy signed up to testify Pro.

item.description: Jeff Pack signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Me.

item.description: Breanna Fokes signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Foothills Rails to Trails Coalition.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: TRAN - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
